verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Evenu shalom alerem, Evenu shalom alerem, Evenu shalom alerem, Evenu shalom, shalom, Shalom Alerem.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: We announce love to you We announce love to you We announce love to you We announce love to you, love in Jesus.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: We proclaim peace to you We proclaim peace to you We proclaim peace to you We proclaim peace to you, peace in Jesus.

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: We announce joy to you We announce joy to you We announce joy to you We proclaim joy to you, joy in Jesus.
